## Q1: VerifyPrimitive renders backend status -> citizen Korean label?

288:        statusLabel = '인증 완료'
291:        statusLabel = '인증 처리 중'
294:        statusLabel = '인증 실패'

## Q2: SubmitPrimitive renders adapter_receipt -> Korean status label?
73:      result: z.unknown().describe('Submit result including transaction_id, status, adapter_receipt'),
255:    // (transaction_id / ministry / status / agency_handoff_url) unwrapped
260:        typeof result?.transaction_id === 'string'
261:          ? result.transaction_id
280:              ? '반려됨'
293:            `✓ ${ministry ? `[${ministry}] ` : ''}제출이 접수되었습니다.`,
296:            ? React.createElement(Text, { dimColor: true }, `접수 번호: ${receiptId}`)

## Q3: SubscribePrimitive renders handle_id -> citizen acknowledgment?
85:        'SubscriptionHandle: { handle_id, lifetime, kind } — stream delivered out-of-band via TUI ⎿ prefix',
253:    // (handle_id / lifetime / kind) unwrapped from ToolResultEnvelope.result.
258:        result && typeof result === 'object' ? result['handle_id'] : undefined
273:      // Drop the explicit "⎿ 실시간 스트림은…" line since MessageResponse now
284:            React.createElement(Text, { bold: true }, '구독 완료: '),
293:            '실시간 스트림은 대화창에서 별도 ⎿ 인용으로 전달됩니다.',
352:        // Future streaming-wired backend may emit { handle_id, lifetime, kind }
354:          (typeof payload['handle_id'] === 'string' && (payload['handle_id'] as string)) ||

## Q4: TUI surfaces mock disclaimer (_mode==='mock' / 🧪 / 모의 응답)?
  Backend stamps _mode='mock' on every adapter output; frontend MUST
  render it so the citizen does not mistake mock invocation for a real
  agency action ('신청됐다' / '인증됐다' mis-info).

### grep _mode/mock disclaimer in TUI primitive renderers:
tui/src/tools/VerifyPrimitive/VerifyPrimitive.ts:176:        if (backendEntry.source_mode === 'internal') {
tui/src/tools/SubmitPrimitive/SubmitPrimitive.ts:184:        if (backendEntry.source_mode === 'internal') {
tui/src/tools/SubscribePrimitive/SubscribePrimitive.ts:186:        if (backendEntry.source_mode === 'internal') {
tui/src/tools/LookupPrimitive/LookupPrimitive.ts:209:        if (backendEntry.source_mode === 'internal') {

### grep source_mode handling (MOCK vs LIVE vs INTERNAL branches):
tui/src/tools/VerifyPrimitive/VerifyPrimitive.ts:176:        if (backendEntry.source_mode === 'internal') {
tui/src/tools/SubmitPrimitive/SubmitPrimitive.ts:184:        if (backendEntry.source_mode === 'internal') {
tui/src/tools/SubscribePrimitive/SubscribePrimitive.ts:186:        if (backendEntry.source_mode === 'internal') {
